name: Income at second bracket boundary
description: Employee earning €28,000 exactly (at boundary between 23% and 33% brackets). INPS contributions (9.19%) are deducted from gross BEFORE calculating IRPEF. All taxable income at 23% rate, with significant employment credit and €1,000 fixed deduction. Verified using verify_italy_tax.py script implementing official formulas.

sources.description: INPS employee contributions are deducted from gross before IRPEF calculation
At bracket boundary - income taxed at 23% on base after INPS deduction
Verified using verify_italy_tax.py (independent Python implementation of official formulas)
